channel.title: AMI — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by AMI (ami).

item.title: CVE-2025-58770 · 7.2 HIGH — TCG2 TPM RT Not Locked Issue
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a user may cause “Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges” by local access. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability can lead to escalation of authorization and potentially impact…

item.title: CVE-2025-33044 · 5.8 MEDIUM — exFat Memory Corruption Issue
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause an Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer by local means. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to memory corruption and impact Inte…

item.title: CVE-2025-22833 · 4.6 MEDIUM — FixupArray Pointer Validation in NTFS
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause a Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input by local accessing. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-22832 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Buffer Overflow in NTFS when parsing the ATTRIBUTE_LIST
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause an Out-of-bounds Write by local. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to data corruption and loss of availability.

item.title: CVE-2025-22831 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Buffer Overflow in NTFS when parsing the VOLUME_NAME
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause an Out-of-bounds Write by local. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to data corruption and loss of availability.

item.title: CVE-2025-33045 · 8.2 HIGH — Legacy Serial Redirection SMRAM Vulnerabilities
item.description: APTIOV contains vulnerabilities in the BIOS where a privileged user may cause “Write-what-where Condition” and “Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor” through local access. The successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities can…

item.title: CVE-2025-22830 · 7.3 HIGH — SmiFlash Race Condition Vulnerability
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a skilled user may cause “Race Condition” by local access. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to resource exhaustion and impact Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability.

item.title: CVE-2025-22834 · 4.2 MEDIUM — ThirdPartyVideo SetVariable Vulnerability
item.description: AMI APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a user may cause “Improper Initialization” by local accessing. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may leave the resource in an unexpected state and potentially impact confidentiality, integ…

item.title: CVE-2025-33043 · 5.8 MEDIUM — SMM buffer Integrity
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause an Improper Input Validation locally. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability can potentially impact of integrity.

item.title: CVE-2024-42446 · 7.5 HIGH — TOCTOU in SmmWhea
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition by local means. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2024-54084 · 7.5 HIGH — SMM Arbitrary Write via TOCTOU Vulnerability
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition by local means. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2024-54085 · 10 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — Redfish Authentication Bypass
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may bypass authentication remotely through the Redfish Host Interface. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availabili…

item.title: CVE-2024-33659 · 5.7 MEDIUM — BiosGuard Buffer Overflow and TOCTOU Vulnerability
item.description: AMI APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause an Improper Input Validation by a local attacker. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities may lead to overwriting arbitrary memory and execute arbitrary code at SMM leve…

item.title: CVE-2024-42444 · 7.5 HIGH — TOCTOU Race Condition between DMA and SMM
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause a TOCTOU Race Condition by local means. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to execution of arbitrary code on the target device.

item.title: CVE-2024-2315 · 6.8 MEDIUM — SMM arbitrary code execution in Overclock
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where may cause Improper Access Control by a local attacker. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to unexpected SPI flash modifications and BIOS boot kit launches, also impacting the availabil…

item.title: CVE-2024-33658 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Buffer Overflow Vulnerability In OFBD
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause an Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer by local. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to privilege escalation and potentially ar…

item.title: CVE-2024-33660 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Potential Firmware update without integrity check
item.description: An exploit is possible where an actor with physical access can manipulate SPI flash without being detected.

item.title: CVE-2024-42442 · 7.2 HIGH — Runtime Service Access outside SMRAM
item.description: APTIOV contains a vulnerability in the BIOS where a user or attacker may cause an improper restriction of operations within the bounds of a memory buffer over the network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to code execution out…

item.title: CVE-2024-33657 · 7.8 HIGH — Smm Callout in SmmComputrace Module
item.description: This SMM vulnerability affects certain modules, allowing privileged attackers to execute arbitrary code, manipulate stack memory, and leak information from SMRAM to kernel space, potentially leading to denial-of-service attacks.

item.title: CVE-2024-33656 · 7.8 HIGH — Memory Leak in SmmComuptrace Module
item.description: The DXE module SmmComputrace contains a vulnerability that allows local attackers to leak stack or global memory. This could lead to privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and bypassing OS security mechanisms

item.title: CVE-2023-37297 · 8.3 HIGH — heap memory overflow
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause a heap memory corruption via an adjacent network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-37296 · 8.3 HIGH — Stack-based Buffer Overflow
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause a stack memory corruption via an adjacent network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-37295 · 8.3 HIGH — Heap-based Buffer Overflow
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause a heap memory corruption via an adjacent network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-37294 · 8.3 HIGH — Heap-based Buffer Overflow
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause a heap memory corruption via an adjacent network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-37293 · 9.6 CRITICAL — stack-based buffer overflow
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause a stack-based buffer overflow via an adjacent network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-34333 · 7.8 HIGH — Untrusted Pointer Dereference
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause an untrusted pointer to dereference via a local network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-3043 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Stack-based Buffer Overflow BMC
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause a stack-based buffer overflow via an adjacent network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-34332 · 7.8 HIGH — Untrusted Pointer Dereference in BMC
item.description: AMI’s SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause an untrusted pointer to dereference by a local network. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and/or availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-39538 · 7.5 HIGH — Failure when uploading a Logo image file
item.description: AMI AptioV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a User may cause an unrestricted upload of a BMP Logo file with dangerous type by Local access. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of Confidentiality, Integrity, and/or Avai…

item.title: CVE-2023-39539 · 7.5 HIGH — Failure when uploading a Logo image file
item.description: AMI AptioV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a User may cause an unrestricted upload of a PNG Logo file with dangerous type by Local access. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of Confidentiality, Integrity, and/or Avai…

item.title: CVE-2023-39537 · 7.5 HIGH — Improper input validation in BIOS TCG2
item.description: AMI AptioV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an Attacker may use an improper input validation via the local network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity and availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-39536 · 7.5 HIGH — Improper input validation in BIOS OFBD
item.description: AMI AptioV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an Attacker may use an improper input validation via the local network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity and availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-39535 · 7.5 HIGH — Improper input validation in BIOS
item.description: AMI AptioV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an Attacker may use an improper input validation via the local network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity and availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-34470 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Improper access control
item.description: AMI AptioV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an Attacker may use an improper access control via the local network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity and availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-34469 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Cold Rest Vulnerabiltiy
item.description: AMI AptioV contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an Attacker may use an improper access control via the physical network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2023-34330 · 8.2 HIGH — Code injection via Dynamic Redfish Extension interface
item.description: AMI SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where a user may inject code which could be executed via a Dynamic Redfish Extension interface. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-34329 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Authentication Bypass via HTTP Header Spoofing
item.description: AMI MegaRAC SPx12 contains a vulnerability in BMC where a User may cause an authentication bypass by spoofing the HTTP header. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to loss of confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-34473 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Usage of Hard-coded Credentials
item.description: AMI SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where a valid user may cause a use of hard-coded credentials. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-34472 · 5.7 MEDIUM
item.description: AMI SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause an improper neutralization of CRLF sequences in HTTP Headers. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of integrity.

item.title: CVE-2023-34471 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Missing Cryptographic Step
item.description: AMI SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where a user may cause a missing cryptographic step by generating a hash-based message authentication code (HMAC). A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to the loss confidentiality, integrity,…

item.title: CVE-2023-34338 · 7.1 HIGH — hard coded cryptographic key
item.description: AMI SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where an Attacker may cause a use of hard-coded cryptographic key by a hard-coded certificate. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-34337 · 7.6 HIGH — Inadequate Encryption Strength
item.description: AMI SPx contains a vulnerability in the BMC where a user may cause an inadequate encryption strength by hash-based message authentication code (HMAC). A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of confidentiality, integrity, and av…

item.title: CVE-2023-34336 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: AMI BMC contains a vulnerability in the IPMI handler, where an attacker with the required privileges can cause a buffer overflow, which may lead to code execution, denial of service, or escalation of privileges.

item.title: CVE-2023-34335 · 7.7 HIGH
item.description: AMI BMC contains a vulnerability in the IPMI handler, where an unauthenticated host is allowed to write to a host SPI flash, bypassing secure boot protections. An exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of integrity or denial of service…

item.title: CVE-2023-34334 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: AMI BMC contains a vulnerability in the SPX REST API, where an attacker with the required privileges can inject arbitrary shell commands, which may lead to code execution, denial of service, information disclosure, or data tampering.

item.title: CVE-2023-34343 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: AMI BMC contains a vulnerability in the SPX REST API, where an attacker with the required privileges can inject arbitrary shell commands, which may lead to code execution, denial of service, information disclosure, or data tampering.

item.title: CVE-2023-34342 · 6 MEDIUM
item.description: AMI BMC contains a vulnerability in the IPMI handler, where an attacker can upload and download arbitrary files under certain circumstances, which may lead to denial of service, escalation of privileges, information disclosure, or data tampering.

item.title: CVE-2023-34341 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: AMI BMC contains a vulnerability in the SPX REST API, where an attacker with the required privileges can read and write to arbitrary locations within the memory context of the IPMI server process, which may lead to code execution, denial of service,…

item.title: CVE-2023-34345 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: AMI BMC contains a vulnerability in the SPX REST API, where an attacker with the required privileges can access arbitrary files, which may lead to information disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2023-34344 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — A vulnerability in the IPMI handler, where an unauthorized attacker can use certain oracles to guess a valid username
item.description: AMI BMC contains a vulnerability in the IPMI handler, where an unauthorized attacker can use certain oracles to guess a valid username, which may lead to information disclosure.
